zh.Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England: 英國爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Leicester於大約1300年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Roger De Leicester24歲，母親Joyce Isabel19歲。他於大約1318年與Mary de Mobberley在英國爾塔波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1349年享年51歲。

zh-hans.Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England: 英国爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Leicester于大约1300年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Roger De Leicester24岁，母亲Joyce Isabel19岁。他于大约1318年与Mary de Mobberley在英国爾塔波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1349年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leicester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lassiter
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Leicester (see   Lester  ). This name has been long established in North America, and occurs in a wide variety of forms.

variants.name: Leister
meanings: German: occupational name for a maker of lasts or a cobbler, from Middle High German leist + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Leicester was born about 1300, in Cheshire, England, his father, Roger De Leicester, was 24 and his mother, Joyce Isabel, was 19. He married Mary de Mobberley about 1318, in Tabley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1349, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Leicester est né environ 1300, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger De Leicester, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joyce Isabel, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Mobberley environ 1318, à Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1349, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Leicester um 1300 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger De Leicester 24 und seine Mutter Joyce Isabel 19. Er hat um 1318 in Tabley, Cheshire, England Mary de Mobberley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1349 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leicester è nato il circa 1300 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Roger De Leicester, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joyce Isabel, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Mobberley circa 1318, nel Tabley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1349, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Leicesterが約1300年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger De Leicesterは24歳，母Joyce Isabelは19歳であった。約1318年にイギリスチェシュアイアタブリーでMary de Mobberleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1349年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Leicester(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger De Leicester(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Isabel(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1318년 영국 체실르 타블리에서 Mary de Mobberley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1349년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1300–Abt 1349: tany ho any amin'ny 1300–tany ho any amin'ny 1349

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leicester nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger De Leicester, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Isabel, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Mobberley aproximadamente 1318, em Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1349, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Leicester родился около 1300 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger De Leicester было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joyce Isabel, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Mobberley около 1318 г. в местности табли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1349 г. в возрасте 51 год.

sm.ABT 1300–Abt 1349: e tusa o le 1300–e tusa o le 1349

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Leicester nació aproximadamente 1300, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger De Leicester, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joyce Isabel, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary de Mobberley aproximadamente 1318, en Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1349, a la edad de 51 años.
